Interface IMapTableTimeInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to time properties of a MapLayerInfo.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3BB80BF2-3E29-4B85-B6D6-551ABE327EAF")]
public interface IMapTableTimeInfo

Properties

EndTimeFieldName

End time field for the table.

string EndTimeFieldName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FullTimeExtent

The time extent for all the data in the table.

ITimeExtent FullTimeExtent { get; }

Property Value

ITimeExtent

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartTimeFieldName

Name of the field that has start time or time instant for a table.

string StartTimeFieldName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsTime

Indicates whether the table supports time.

bool SupportsTime { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TimeInterval

Suggested draw time interval for refreshing the table contents.

double TimeInterval { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

TimeIntervalUnits

Draw time interval units.

esriTimeUnits TimeIntervalUnits { get; }

Property Value

esriTimeUnits

Examples

Sample Snippet

TimeReference

Native TimeReference of the contents of the table.

ITimeReference TimeReference { get; }

Property Value

ITimeReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

TimeValueFormat

Time field(s) values format.

string TimeValueFormat { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

TrackIDFieldName

Field that identifies or groups unique objects for which time values are recorded in a table.

string TrackIDFieldName { get; }

Property Value

string
